notes: USB charging now keeps the device awake. Plug it in: the screen stays on and dims/blanks per your power-mode settings, but no auto-off after 5 min as before. The charger (AXP2101) was always topping up regardless, but the chip would deep-sleep and you'd see a fresh splash on unplug — confusing. Now the same charge cable behaves the way you'd expect: device available the whole time you're charging.
